title: Wallet P&L Tracker
description: Unrealized P&L for every token in a wallet — shows entry price, current price, and total gain/loss per position.
useCase: Build an unrealized P&L dashboard that shows every open token position — entry cost, current value, and total gain/loss in USD — for any wallet in real time.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to fetch P&L for
